honors_and_awards.title: John G. Kemeny Computation Prize for Innovation
honors_and_awards.issuer: Dartmouth College, Department of Computer Science
honors_and_awards.description:
Associated with Dartmouth College

Awarded for Monad, an original browser game where users upload Artificial Intelligence (AI) bots. These bots are then automatically played against other users' bots, and are assigned a skill rating based on performance. This project was built using Python, Javascript, Docker, ReactJS and MongoDB… more

honors_and_awards.title: HackDartmouth IV, Best Amazon Alexa App
honors_and_awards.issuer: Dartmouth College, Thayer School of Engineering
honors_and_awards.description:
Associated with Dartmouth College

For this hackathon 4 of us developed an Alexa skill for communicating daily Dartmouth Dining Options. I wrote a webscraper for identifying the notoriously confusing daily Dartmouth dining options, and storing them in a database. I also made sure that our Alexa skill was connected to the webscraper API so it could communicate information to the user. This project was created using Python, Javascript, Alexa-Skills kit, and MongoDB… more
